questions.text: Type the name of one person who would be proud of your streak.
What were you about to do when you picked up your phone?
Name one thing you'll do instead of scrolling right now.
Type 'I am stronger than this urge' to continue.
What is one goal you're working toward this week?
Name someone you're doing this for (including yourself).
What did you accomplish today that you're proud of?
How will you feel in 30 minutes if you start scrolling now?
What's one habit you completed today that future-you will thank you for?
Name a physical activity you could do in the next 5 minutes instead.
Type 'I choose growth over comfort' to continue.
On a scale of 1-10, how strong is your urge right now? Just type the number.
What's one thing you want to be known for a year from now?
What triggered this urge? Boredom, stress, loneliness, or something else?
Describe one thing you can see right now that you're grateful for.
